# cloud_gcp corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === GCP / OAuth ===
# expect: GCP OAuth Client ID
# expect: GCP OAuth Refresh Token
407408718192-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz012345.apps.googleusercontent.com
token 1//04abcDEFghiJKLmnoPQRstuvEXAMPLE here

# === GCP / Service Account ===
# expect: GCP Service Account client_email
# expect: GCP Service Account JSON Type
svc-bot@my-project-123.iam.gserviceaccount.com
{ "type": "service_account", "project_id": "demo" }

# === GCP / GCS HMAC ===
# expect: GCS HMAC Access ID
GOOG1EXAMPLEABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789ABCDEFGHIJ

# === GCP / Firebase ===
# expect: GCP FCM Legacy Server Key
# expect: GCP Firebase Database URL
AAAAxxxxxyz:APA91babcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJ
https://my-app-demo.firebaseio.com

# === GCP / reCAPTCHA ===
# expect: GCP reCAPTCHA Key
6LcExampleAAAAABBBBBCCCCCDDDDDEEEEEFFFFG

# === GCP / Cloud Run ===
# expect: GCP Cloud Run Service URL
https://svc-abc-uc.a.run.app

# === Yandex Cloud ===
# expect: Yandex Cloud API Key
# expect: Yandex Cloud IAM Token
AQVNexampleABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123
t1.9euExampleHeaderPartABCDEF.9euExamplePayloadPartABCDEF
